programme.title: E30
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: E36 - Argy - Boussay
programme.desc: An old fortified manor of Berry, the Argy castle is located near Bourges. Its current owner is a direct descendant of the original lords who built it. Originally a medieval fortress built during the Crusades, the Boussay castle became a Renaissance residence and later an agricultural estate.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: Bol Radha Bol
programme.desc: Kishan returns to revive his father's factory and falls in love, but someone has taken his place back home, drawing him into danger and unexpected rivalry. Release Year: 1992 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Kahaani 2: Durga Rani Singh
programme.desc: In a small town, Vidya cares for Minnie, a girl with paralysis. When Minnie is kidnapped, Vidya attempts a rescue but suffers an accident, landing in hospital while Minnie's fate hangs in danger. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sujoy Ghosh

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E15 - 夢幻城堡「好戲」即將上演
programme.desc: 一檔演員搭檔研習進階真人秀，由關錦鵬、吳鎮宇、許鞍華擔當“研習制作人”，參與研習階段任務、監制和拍攝作品，蘇可擔任“研習指導”，陳喬恩、謝娜、李維嘉、吳昕作為“研習助力團”；十多位參與的青年演員，通過共同的生活和訓練，共同開啟尋找搭檔的研習生活。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 以美食為介質的全新文化訪談類節目，每集邀請文化名人、名廚大師、外籍帥哥、直播網紅和民間饕客一同做客飯局，在品嚐民間美味的同時，分享人生故事。

Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Managing Asia
programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Channel Japan
programme.desc: 'Channel Japan' offers a fresh look at the latest in the economy, business, technology, culture and sightseeing of Japan.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: European Le Mans
programme.desc: With six 4-hour races on Europe's most technical and demanding circuits, the ELMS is the perfect proving ground for any competitor wishing to take on the challenge of the next stage on the endurance ladder, the FIA World Endurance Championship, and the pinnacle of the sport, the 24 Hours of Le Mans.

programme.title: Michelin Le Mans Cup
programme.desc: Over the years, the Michelin Le Mans Cup has become the main series for amateur drivers looking for an introduction to Endurance racing. Launched in 2016, the competition takes place on some of Europe's most iconic circuits. The MLMC is the first step into the world of endurance racing for the young stars of tomorrow.

programme.desc: CNBC's longest running feature show. For over 20 years Christine Tan has been talking to people who are shaping, governing and leading the Asia-Pacific region in this multi-award award winning show.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: E4 - Yoann Merienne - Magnetic Fields
programme.desc: Painter and sculptor Yoann Merienne is known for his attention to detail, the intensity of his drawings, and his mastery of light and shadow. His work draws inspiration from virtual imagery, fiction and mythology.

programme.title: Paris La Blanche
programme.desc: Nour has been in Paris for nearly fifty years. At 70, his wife Rekia leaves Algeria for the first time to persuade him to return home to his village there. But after such a long time, the man that she eventually finds has become a stranger.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leila. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: E47 - Solderer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: E51 - Veterinary Clinic
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: E21 - Rebel Mother
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: E5 - Frederique Gourdon - The Quest For The Living
programme.desc: Time's imprint lies at the heart of Frederique Gourdon's artistic exploration. After years of working with mixed media-painting, engraving, collage-she experienced a profound encounter in 2015 with paper and plant fiber.

programme.title: E4 - Ali Akbar (Pakistan)
programme.desc: After more than fifty years selling newspapers by shouting the headlines, Ali was made a Knight of the National Order of Merit. At 18, he left Pakistan and arrived in France without knowing the language. By selling ''Charlie Hebdo'', ''Hara-Kiri'' and later ''Le Monde'', he became an emblematic figure of the Saint-Germain-des-Pres district in Paris.

programme.title: E8 - Gregoire Larenaudie (Paris)/Silax (Fontenay-Sous-Bois)
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski meets those reinventing French culinary arts. In Paris' 11th arrondissement, Gregoire Larenaudie runs the restaurant-bakery Panopano. There, he creates innovative dishes where bread, made on site with ancient flours and natural sourdough, takes center stage. In Fontenay-sous-Bois, Franco-Malian pastry chef Silamaka Soukouna, known as Silax, revisits classics by lightening them and combining them with Malian products. Keen to pass on his know-how, he leads culinary workshops in his childhood neighborhood, convinced that pastry-making can be a vector of social emancipation.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Outre-mer
programme.desc: Outre-mer part à la rencontre des habitants des îles d'outre-mer pour explorer leur quotidien. L'émission met en lumière leurs réalités, leurs défis et les problématiques locales, offrant un regard humain et authentique sur ces territoires souvent méconnus.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Actuelles
programme.desc: Le journal de celles qui font l'actualité internationale et de ceux qui font bouger le monde, encore largement dominé par les hommes. Avec des reportages, des invités et une page internet.

programme.title: E103 - Driving Miss Hazy / No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their 'baby'sitter.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E205 - Captain Man: On Vacation
programme.desc: Ray has trusted Henry and Charlotte with protecting Swellview while he’s out of town at his cousin's wedding. Problems arise when they find themselves having to handle things on their own.

programme.title: E290 - Spatula of the Heavens / Gary's Playhouse
programme.desc: SpongeBob embarks on an epic journey to have his beloved spatula reforged by the legendary Guru Greasetrap. // SpongeBob builds a snail-house outside for Gary to play in while he is at work.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E265 - Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: E706 - Road Trip: Bringing Down the House / Road Trip: Mountain Hard Pass
programme.desc: During a visit of the White House, the Loud kids can't help but sneak off and explore the rooms not on the tour. // Intimidated by an intense day of hiking in the Rocky Mountains, the Loud kids try to find reasons to call off the hike.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E808 - Karaless Whisper / Dollars and Scents
programme.desc: Lincoln and friends try to befriend new girl Kara when they learn she has access to a legendary missing comic book. // Miguel enlists Leni's help when he launches his own perfume line at Reininger's.

programme.title: E203 - J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: E226 - Chatterbox Gary / Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. Everyone loves it... except for Squidward! // When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: E805 - Europe Road Trip: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: The Louds travel to London when Luna receives an invitation to Mick Swagger's knighting ceremony but get caught up in a special mission when Lincoln runs into a familiar face.

programme.title: E121 - Kid Grounded
programme.desc: When Henry is caught sneaking out at night, he is grounded, preventing him from completing his crime-fighting duties. While Piper drives him crazy at home, Charlotte steps into the sidekick role.

programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse

programme.title: E21 - Pak Choi
programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E100 - Lights Out
programme.desc: When the lights go out in Home Dome, the Teletubbies get the giggles! The lights come back on again and there's Tubby Custard mess everywhere.

programme.title: E24 - Wobbly Tower
programme.desc: When Mayor Oki wants to build a new tower, Messy is keen to help. There is just one problem - all his towers fall over...

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E30 - Star Renovation
programme.desc: Venus has attempted to redecorate the night sky, but now Sarah can't find any of her favourite constellations...

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.title: E5 - Desserts Of Destiny
programme.desc: Evil Pea lures Supertato and Tomato into her cave of frosted doom. Can they find the courage to avoid her traps and retrieve The Lost Candle of Birthdays for Tomato's Museum?

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E15 - The Love Badge
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E97 - Treasure Trail
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po follow a trail of flowers which leads them to some very special treasure.

programme.title: E1 - Ready Steady Go!
programme.desc: Join the dance party with the Teletubbies! Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po dance and sing and do some exercise.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E4 - Panicky Percy
programme.desc: Percy causes confusion for everyone and prompts delays, when he spends too much time panicking over nothing.

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E4 - Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.title: E3 - The Shape Badge
programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

programme.title: E4 - The Juice Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is going to make the squirrels juice from the garden. Whilst picking the fruit, the squirrels meet a little bug, full of woes about being too small.

programme.title: E6 - The Fossil Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are digging in the garden when they come across a fossil, so Duggee and Narrator explain all about fossils and prehistoric times.

programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: The Lost Prince
programme.desc: A doting father entertains his seven-year-old daughter with fantastical stories, but as she grows up her interest wains.

programme.title: Happy Hour (Part 1)
programme.desc: A slow-burning epic chronicling the emotional journey of four thirty something women in the misty seaside city of Kobe.

programme.title: Broker
programme.desc: A mother goes on a road trip with two baby brokers to sell the baby she abandoned as the police follow their trail.

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E3 - Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Join Blippi on an adventure to the wonders of our world & beyond! First, he travels to the tallest mountain on Earth, Mt. Everest, with his new friend Betty the Yeti. Then, he dives deep into the ocean to explore a kelp forest with Jerry the Jellyfish. The adventure gets explosive as Blippi & FETCH fly into a volcano! After exploring the Earth, Blippi blasts off into space to tour the solar system, learn about gravity on the moon & discover how rainbows get their amazing colors!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E1 - Let's Sing with All the Animals
programme.desc: It's time to sing, play & learn with all of JJ's animal pals! The fun begins as JJ hosts a big talent show in the clubhouse where all his friends get to showcase their unique skills, from magic to circus tricks! Then, everyone joins in for a fun game of 'Follow the Leader,' where JJ learns that a little encouragement goes a long way. Plus, sing along as the friends learn all the different sounds the animals make & help Humpty Dumpty when he keeps falling off a wall!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!

programme.title: The Nazca Booby Bad Big Brother
programme.desc: On the Galapagos Islands, the Nazca booby lays its eggs on the ground. After the chicks have hatched, only the stronger one survives. The parent fusses over the remaining chick.

programme.title: The Filth
programme.desc: Sir Howler is expecting a visit from the king any second! Only problem is, the town where he lives is a total garbage dump! So the Little Urchins get to work to make the place look spic and span, demonstrating the spectrum of medieval cleaning techniques.

programme.title: Trip to Siberia
programme.desc: While Zoe and Milo warm up inside, Alim suggests skating. The kids doubt it's possible in such cold. To prove them wrong, Alim takes them to Siberia. There, Sergei shows them Siberian life-permafrost, stilt houses, and melting ice for water.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hidden Gem
programme.desc: When Addison and Tess find a note in a funny old pair of rummage sale pants, they think they may have found a clue to lead them to a stash of priceless hidden diamonds!

programme.title: Clothespin
programme.desc: What can Hepi and Briko make with clothespins? Let's find out!

programme.title: Trapped In Time
programme.desc: Naomi keeps repeating the same day over and over again, until she learns that her selfish attitude is what has caused her to be stuck in the loop.

programme.title: New Mayor
programme.desc: An election is happening in Hilltown. It's usually an unimportant event since Senior is the only candidate. This year DiktaThor gets on the campaign with empty promises about superpowers for all. It's up to Sprinter to gather the town behind the drowsy Senior.

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors break down blood and show you how to make an amazing blood lava lamp!

programme.title: A Singing Cat
programme.desc: A shy antelope needs surgery, while a cute orphaned fox cub gets checked over. Johnny and Inel discover a singing cat. And a gull tries to fly free again after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Solving A Mystery
programme.desc: The cute homeless dogs are looking for new owners, and Johnny and Inel solve the mysteries of goats that climb trees and dogs with unusual toilet habits! The Junior Vets are trying to figure out how to give a big brown bear its medicine.

programme.title: The Frog in The Fog
programme.desc: A heavy sea fog rolls in while Darwin and Burpee are on the island, so Newts and Kea need to build a lighthouse to help them navigate the waka home.

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

E6 - Bloodsports
programme.desc: Since ancient times through the modern day, brutal games thrill both players and spectators. We explore the origins of history's deadliest games - from Roman bloodsports to Russian roulette.

programme.title: E7 - Echoes Of Emptiness
programme.desc: Starvation and exhaustion push the survivalists to their limits as the wild game taunts them. While one participant looks for a reason to carry on, another teeters on the edge of their breaking point.

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: Delhi's Black Kites: How Raptors Keep A Megacity Running
programme.desc: Scientists reveal how Delhi's black kites feed on waste and interact with people. Plus: How a 600-year-old network is easing Bidar's water problems.

programme.title: How Africa Is Building Forward
programme.desc: Today, host Maty Sy welcomes you from the new Goethe-Institut in Dakar, designed by Pritzker Prize laureate Francis Kere. Senegalese architect Nzinga Mboup, who oversaw the project, tours you around.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: Electric Fruit: The Nigerian Market Running On Rotten Food
programme.desc: In a Lagos market, spoiled pineapples and watermelons are turned into biogas. Plus: E-cargo bikes drive health and sustainability in Uganda.

programme.title: Spiked - The Insidious Use Of Knockout Drops
programme.desc: Knockout drops: colorless, tasteless and extremely dangerous. They've been around for decades and are used to incapacitate people in order to rob, rape and even kill them.

programme.title: Delhi's Black Kites: How Raptors Keep A Megacity Running
programme.desc: Scientists reveal how Delhi's black kites feed on waste and interact with people. Plus: How a 600-year-old network is easing Bidar's water problems.

programme.title: Electric Mobility: From Ethiopia To The Premium Ev Market
programme.desc: Addis Ababa is expanding electric buses and taxis to cut costs and modernize transport, but the transition faces structural challenges. Plus: we review the DS N°8 and its place among high-end electric cars.

programme.title: How This Invasive Tree Made Wildfires Worse
programme.desc: Eucalyptus has been planted across the world for quick profits. But the highly flammable and invasive tree is now reshaping fire behavior.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

From Phoenix to the World, is a news program where reporters from around the world interact directly with the anchors through satellite and telephone lines to put audiences in touch with important events right form where they happen.

programme.title: E1494
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E424
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

From Phoenix to the World, is a news program where reporters from around the world interact directly with the anchors through satellite and telephone lines to put audiences in touch with important events right form where they happen.

programme.title: E1494

From Phoenix to the World, is a news program where reporters from around the world interact directly with the anchors through satellite and telephone lines to put audiences in touch with important events right form where they happen.

programme.title: E502
programme.desc: HONG KONG PERSPECTIVES: Hong Kong Perspectives is a Cantonese-language programme. Through interviewing people from different walks of life and key figures in major events, the programme provides viewers with an in-depth understanding of Hong Kong. Staying close to public sentiment and targeting hot topics of social concern, it dissects Hong Kong's current affairs and future prospects from political, economic, livelihood, and cultural perspectives, examining them with varying degrees of depth and perspective.

programme.title: E223
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.
Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: E6129-004
programme.desc: Edo Kiriko cut glass techniques have been passed from artisan to artisan for over 100 years - more women who now pursue the craft create popular new designs.

programme.title: E6030-033
programme.desc: The Niwaka Costume Festival: In Yoshiwara, a high-ranking courtesan tends to a patron and a jester tries to entertain with an eccentric costume, hinting at the Edo townspeople's affinity for cosplay.

programme.title: E2050-176
programme.desc: Hisayama Town in southern Japan has held health check-ups since the 1960s - using this data, Kyushu University identified two markers linked to early dementia. We present the latest findings.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: E1 - Northern Territory: Darwin - Vibrant Gateway to the Outback
programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.title: E1 - The Force of Nature
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

programme.title: E6 - The Tough Get Going
programme.desc: With a low morale at camp, the teams must work together to safely rappel down a dangerous cliff, and face their coldest night thus far. With Robin and Wilson gone, the teams find a new pace, and realize an even playing field translates to stiffer competition.

programme.title: E1 - Land Meets Bayou
programme.desc: Similar to any good Cajun dish, a successful duck camp requires preparation. The last day on dry land is filled with essential stops to get ready for 5 days on the Bayou. Whether making sure we have the right ingredients for our favorite meals, or getting the boats brushed up and ready for action, the day before can be just as important as the day of.

programme.title: E1 - Mexico
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo’s bravery (or stupidity) doesn’t end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into the city’s toxic sewage. With all of these dauntless activities the question becomes, can Rooftop and Catfish make it out of Mexico in one piece?

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E5 - Heavy Haulage in the Jungle
programme.desc: Heavy transport in the rainforest. For the Sao Manoel hydroelectric power plant in the heart of Brazil, massive elements have to be delivered over a long and arduous route. The transformers weigh more than 200 tonnes each - the way to the destination, almost 4000 kilometres. Heat, dust and dirt roads that are completely dry and full of bumps. The journey becomes dangerous, sometimes it's a matter of centimetres. Then comes the river crossing - with more than 200 tonnes of cargo. The current is unhurried, but what the river swallows is lost. The transport takes seven weeks and delays cost money, breakdowns cost a lot of money - mistakes must not be made here.

programme.title: E6 - The Tough Get Going
programme.desc: With a low morale at camp, the teams must work together to safely rappel down a dangerous cliff, and face their coldest night thus far. With Robin and Wilson gone, the teams find a new pace, and realize an even playing field translates to stiffer competition.

programme.title: E1 - Northern Territory: Darwin - Vibrant Gateway to the Outback
programme.desc: Sara travels to Darwin, visiting markets and experiencing the local culture and delicacies, discovering strong influences from Asia.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E3 - Nobody Likes Visiting the Dentist
programme.desc: Head into surgery with Mara the koala, who needs a life-saving tooth operation, then assess an injured sugar glider with vet Tim. Cheer as rescue officer Elise pulls a flying fox out of a gutter and see nurse Bree’s clutch of python eggs hatch.

programme.title: E6 - Home Invasion
programme.desc: Respond to danger on a rural property with Mick and Adele, who brave a fired-up brown snake. Tread carefully as Jess and Dan extract a python from a play area, and get spooked when a chicken-hunting python squashes Liv’s hand during a tense rescue.

programme.title: E3 - The Wild West
programme.desc: Complete the trip’s final lap in the untamed lands where Australia’s interior desert meets the hot, hostile Indian Ocean. Confront the challenges of survival in this region as Lizzie dives with tiger sharks, manta rays, and nomadic turtles.

programme.title: E3 - The Monkey Diaries
programme.desc: Hidden in the jungles of Sri Lanka is the toque macaque. Endemic to the island, these feisty group-living monkeys are found nowhere else on earth. And they are at the heart of the longest primate research project ever undertaken. Dr Wolfgang Dittus is on a quest to understand their complex society.

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.title: E3 - Kesi Turns a Corner
programme.desc: Watch a milestone moment when two students get their first forest time in years. And another pair of students are confined to the school’s clinic after an accident in the forest leaves Beni with a broken leg and Lala with a broken elbow.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E3 - A Busy Bay
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in Marina Bay, where the Nomads and Townies are squatting while Anna and the Bay Family are away upriver. Soak up the peaceful otter life in this luxurious waterway before the surprise early return of its rightful owners.

programme.title: E1 - The Journey Begins
programme.desc: The source of the Mekong River is high up in the Tibetan plateau, from there it flows into Yunnan Province, China, where our journey begins. Even though Yunnan occupies less than 4% of China’s land, it is home to over half of its birds and mammals.

programme.desc: The epic battle between Dirk O, the Council of Comics, Mike and X unfolds at the city hall! Mike's potential explodes!

programme.title: E111 - The Vase/The Ollie/The Sorcerer/The Outside/The Copycats
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and 'accidentally' break her latest hideous vase. But when Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: Ah Kam
programme.desc: Ah Kam is from Mainland China and is trained in kung fu. She becomes a double in Hong Kong. Tung and his partners of the Tung's Family, a stunt man group, cannot work as stuntmen after an ambush. Tung lets Kam try being the stunt director and Kam becomes very popular. Kam married Sam and moves to Shenzhen to look after Sam's karaoke business. However, being a karaoke manager does not suit Kam. At the same time, Sam is unfaithful and so Kam returns to the movie industry and once again becomes a stuntwoman...
